summary: Iteration 9: Tested Simplified Chit Fund System. Changed from auction_amount to dividend_received field. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Entry Modal with month dropdown (paid months marked with ✓), 'Is Mahine Mila (₹)' field, live calculation (EMI Paid - Mila = Effective Cost), Detail Modal with correct columns.
passed_tests: GET /api/chit-funds/{id}/paid-months - Returns paid months list for dropdown
POST /api/chit-funds/{id}/monthly-entry - Accepts dividend_received instead of auction_amount
Effective cost calculation: EMI Paid - Dividend Received
Monthly entry updates chit totals (total_paid, total_dividend, payments_count)
Monthly entries list shows dividend_received and effective_cost fields
Summary net profit calculation works correctly
Delete entry updates chit totals correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Simplified formula correctly implemented: Effective Cost = EMI Paid - Dividend Received
Month dropdown shows all months with paid months disabled and marked with ✓
Transaction description updated to show 'EMI: ₹X | Mila: ₹Y' format
Backend handles both old (auction_amount/dividend) and new (dividend_received) field names
Hindi/Hinglish labels throughout the UI for better user experience
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified Chit Fund System fully tested. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_chit_simplified.py covers all new APIs. Key changes: (1) dividend_received field replaces auction_amount, (2) paid-months API for month dropdown, (3) Effective Cost = EMI - Dividend, (4) Transaction description shows 'EMI: ₹X | Mila: ₹Y'.

simplified_dividend_system.formula: Effective Cost = EMI Paid - Dividend Received
